productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Casual Black Grey Shoe
description: Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a classic design from red tape. These shoes in a sneaker design are designed for comfort and will look great when teamed with jeans and tees for a casual look.Upper High quality leather uppers with distressed look for protection, comfort and durability Grey leather panel overlays for extra style Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with TPR lugs on the forefoot and heel for better grip and durability shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
